steps.title: Simplify the left side
steps.content: Start by distributing the 2 into the parentheses on the left side of the equation: $$2(3t - 10) + t$$ becomes $$6t - 20 + t$$. Combine like terms: $$6t + t = 7t$$, so the left side simplifies to $$7t - 20$$.

steps.title: Isolate 3t directly
steps.content: With the equation $$7t - 20 = 40 + 4t$$, subtract $$4t$$ from both sides to get $$3t - 20 = 40$$. Then add 20 to both sides: $$3t = 60$$. Since the question asks for the value of $$3t$$, no further solving is needed. B is correct.
